framework_selection.rationale: Real-time grid animation (illuminated slices, playhead), Cycles-inspired visual language, interactive 2D grid interaction — all suit HTML5 Canvas + JS. Pattern proven with BeadyEye.

implementation_phases: Phase 1: Foundation — file loading, SLICE mode, basic voice, WebView skeleton
Phase 2: Polyphony + Filter — full voice pool, POLY mode, SVF filter
Phase 3: Time Stretch + ARP — WSOLA, ARP engine
Phase 4: Cartesian Sequencer — 4 lanes, traversal patterns, SEQ mode
Phase 5: Mod Matrix + Polish — LFO/CC, drag+drop, presets, pluginval
